name: story-grid-skills
description: Story Grid mentorship-program coaching skills for beat-level drilling: mock grading against the real examiner's bar, Socratic line-editing, drill-worksheet generation, brainstorming/pressure-testing, and knowledge-base sync. Distinct from creative-writing (drafting Jim & Percy) — this plugin coaches the beat-writing submission cycle (Lessons/, knowledge/, workbench/, feedback rounds).
